note: Exclude Node Title has one config settings object, three permissions, and a preprocess-based suppression mechanism. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want to hide the node title (h1) on every Article node's full page view. Which module setting/mode do I use and where do I configure it?
evals.expected_output: At /admin/config/content/exclude-node-title set the Article content type's exclude mode to 'All nodes' and check the 'Full' view mode; stored as content_types.article=all and content_type_modes.article in exclude_node_title.settings.

evals.prompt: I only want the exclude_node_title module to hide the title in the teaser view mode, not on the full node page. How is that controlled?
evals.expected_output: Each content type has a set of view-mode checkboxes (content_type_modes.<bundle>); check only 'teaser' so isTitleExcluded() returns true just for that view mode.

evals.prompt: I want editors to decide per node whether the title is hidden, rather than hiding it for all nodes of a type. How do I set that up in exclude_node_title?
evals.expected_output: Set the content type's mode to 'User defined nodes' (content_types.<bundle>=user); this adds an 'Exclude title from display' checkbox on the node edit form; per-node ids are stored in State (exclude_node_title_nid_list).

evals.prompt: What are the two ways exclude_node_title can suppress a title, and which setting chooses between removing the text and just visually hiding it?
evals.expected_output: The 'type' setting: 'remove' empties the title markup (HtmlEscapedText('')), 'hidden' keeps the markup and adds a visually-hidden class. Configured via 'Type of rendering' on the settings form.

evals.prompt: Which permission gates the exclude_node_title settings form, and which permissions let a user toggle the per-node exclude checkbox?
evals.expected_output: 'administer exclude node title' gates the settings form; 'exclude any node title' lets a user toggle the node-edit checkbox on any node, 'exclude own node title' only on nodes they own.

evals.prompt: What is the route name and path of the Exclude Node Title settings form, and which config object stores its values?
evals.expected_output: Route exclude_node_title.settings at /admin/config/content/exclude-node-title; values stored in the exclude_node_title.settings config object.

evals.prompt: How does exclude_node_title actually suppress the title in templates without deleting the title value?
evals.expected_output: It uses preprocess hooks (preprocess_page_title, preprocess_page, preprocess_node, preprocess_html) plus a page_title_block alter, calling ExcludeNodeTitleManager::isTitleExcluded() to blank or visually-hide the title vars; adds an exclude-node-title body class. The stored title is untouched.

evals.prompt: Can exclude_node_title hide titles in core Search results, and does it work with Display Suite layouts?
evals.expected_output: The 'search' setting (needs the Search module) strips titles from node_search results; it also overrides the Display Suite node_title field via hook_ds_fields_info_alter so DS displays honor the same exclude settings.
